title: Observation (social-history, coded answer) -> OMOP observation: Tobacco smoking status = Ex-smoker
notes:
A US-Core social-history Observation whose code (LOINC 72166-2 'Tobacco smoking status') resolves to a standard concept in the Observation domain, so it routes to the OMOP observation table (not measurement). The answer is a valueCodeableConcept, so value_as_concept_id is populated.

Resolution (mapspec/etl/_resolve_observation.sql + Observation__observation.sql), all verified against vocab.concept:
- Observation.code.coding[0] = LOINC 72166-2. Its source concept is concept_id 43054909 'Tobacco smoking status' (vocabulary_id=LOINC, domain_id=Observation, standard_concept=S). Because it is already a standard concept it Maps-to itself, so observation_concept_id = 43054909 (domain_id='Observation' -> this edge's WHERE std_domain='Observation' keeps it; sibling Observation__measurement drops it).
- observation_source_value = the raw LOINC code '72166-2' (best-vocabulary coding; LOINC preferred via the ORDER BY in the resolve pass).
- observation_source_concept_id = the SOURCE concept_id 43054909 (stage-2 projects r.src_concept_id; here the LOINC source concept happens to equal the standard concept because LOINC tobacco status is itself standard).
- value: valueCodeableConcept.coding[0] = SNOMED 8517006 'Ex-smoker'. Its source concept is 4310250 'Ex-smoker' (non-standard). It Maps-to TWO standard Observation concepts: 903651 'Currently doesn't use tobacco or its derivatives' (OMOP Extension, domain Observation) and 1340204 'History of event'. The value LATERAL picks the lowest concept_id (ORDER BY vstd.concept_id LIMIT 1), so value_as_concept_id = 903651.
- value_source_value = valueCodeableConcept.text = 'Ex-smoker (finding)' (r.value_text, truncated to 50). value_as_string stays NULL (only valueString feeds value_as_string; a CodeableConcept answer does not).
- observation_date / observation_datetime from effectiveDateTime 2020-02-06T00:26:05 -> date 2020-02-06, datetime 2020-02-06T00:26:05.
- observation_type_concept_id = 32817 (EHR), constant for every observation row.
- person_id = referenceToId(subject) -> ref:patient-1. visit_occurrence_id = referenceToId(encounter) -> ref:enc-1.
- provider_id is NULL: the resource has no performer (performer.first() is absent), so referenceToId(NULL) -> NULL.
- qualifier_concept_id / qualifier_source_value NULL: no interpretation. unit_* NULL: the answer is coded, not a Quantity.
- Status 'final' passes the entered-in-error/cancelled/unknown filter; the value-presence WHERE passes because value_code is present.
- Exactly ONE output row: a single coding mapping to a single standard concept (no per-coding fan-out, no panel-parent drop), and it routes only to observation (zero measurement rows).

Note: category 'social-history' is NOT read by the view/ETL (routing is purely by the resolved concept's domain_id), but it is kept on the resource as realistic context; meta/profile and issued are stripped (issued is not used — effectiveDateTime drives the date).

omop.value_as_concept_id__name: Currently doesn't use tobacco or its derivatives
